title: Elaphoglossum cubense
taxonomy: Elaphoglossum cubense is classified as a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This family is commonly known as the wood ferns or shield ferns. Elaphoglossum cubense is further classified into the genus Elaphoglossum, which is a large and diverse group of epiphytic ferns. The genus Elaphoglossum is itself part of the order Polypodiales, which includes various types of ferns. Elaphoglossum cubense is native to Cuba, and its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
